# Supplier onboarding

When a customer adds a new supplier to their vendor roster, the supplier gets
an automated onboarding email with a one-time link to submit their W-9,
banking information, and contact details.

## Common issues
- Supplier can't find the email: ask the customer to resend from the
  Suppliers list. The link is valid for 7 days.
- Supplier submitted wrong W-9: no way to undo from the supplier side. The
  customer admin needs to reject the submission in Suppliers > Pending, then
  the system emails a fresh link.
- Banking info rejected: usually ABA routing vs wire routing mismatch. Ask
  the supplier to confirm the "ACH" routing number with their bank.
